title: rhodanthe citrina
intro: Rhodanthe citrina, also known as the Sunshine Rhodanthe or Billy Button, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Rhodanthe citrina is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
